old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-pw7o","title":"Echo reply uses local_addr instead of ip_header.dst for unicast","description":"File: rust/lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs:760-761

When building echo reply:
```rust
let reply_icmp = echo.build_reply(local_addr, &ip_header.src, truncated_data)?;
let reply_ip = Ipv6Header::new(next_header::ICMPV6, *local_addr, ip_header.src);
```

The reply source is `local_addr`, not `ip_header.dst`. 

This matters for nodes with multiple addresses:
- If a ping arrives at a secondary address (e.g., ULA), the reply should come FROM that address
- Currently, it always comes from `local_addr` (presumably the link-local)

Per RFC 4443 Section 4.2: 'The source address of an Echo Reply...SHOULD be the same as the destination address of the Echo Request message.'

This could cause issues:
1. Reply from wrong address confuses sender
2. Checksum computed over wrong addresses (though local_addr is used consistently)
3. Firewall rules expecting reply from requested address may block

Fix: Use `ip_header.dst` as reply source instead of `local_addr`.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:34:38.605382Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:34:38.605409Z"}


The reply source is `local_addr`, not `ip_header.dst`. 

This matters for nodes with multiple addresses:
- If a ping arrives at a secondary address (e.g., ULA), the reply should come FROM that address
- Currently, it always comes from `local_addr` (presumably the link-local)

Per RFC 4443 Section 4.2: 'The source address of an Echo Reply...SHOULD be the same as the destination address of the Echo Request message.'

This could cause issues:
1. Reply from wrong address confuses sender
2. Checksum computed over wrong addresses (though local_addr is used consistently)
3. Firewall rules expecting reply from requested address may block

Fix: Use `ip_header.dst` as reply source instead of `local_addr`.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:34:38.605382Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:18:13.956567607Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:18:13.956567607Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:23:13.956567607Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:18:13.956567607Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: ff67204af - Echo reply now correctly uses ip_header.dst as source IP (and for build_reply checksum). Comment updated with RFC reference and bead. Multi-address support fixed."}
Reply source fixed to use request dst per RFC 4443 (commit ff67204af). Multi-homed nodes now reply correctly.

new_value: {"notes":"Commit: 02235bc3f - Added tracing::warn! for invalid SLIP escape (FESC + bad byte) in slip_decode_byte. Prevents silent data corruption. Added use tracing::warn;. Matches RFC 1055 error handling recommendation."}
